name: 6" Arch Table Clock Black - Room Essentials™
description:
Uplift your space with the 6" Arch Table Clock Black from Room Essentials™. Featuring a classic analog display with an off-white clock face, this lightweight yet durable clock blends seamlessly with any decor. The arched design adds sophistication, making it perfect for desks, nightstands or shelves. Whether for functionality or aesthetics, this clock is a stylish and practical addition to your home or office.

Room Essentials™: Everyday Value.
